instruction:
The height "y" and the distance x along horizontal for a body projected in the vertical plane are given by $2y = 6t - 3t^2$ and $x = 4t$. Then the initial velocity and angle of projection are

Options:
A. $$5, 30^o$$
B. 5, 60^o
C. 4, \pi / 4
D. $$5, \pi / 6$$
E. 5, \pi / 4
F. 5, 3 \pi / 6
G. $$5,45^o$$
H. 5, \pi / 3
I. $$5. \pi/3$$
J. $$Tan^{-1}(3/4)$$
